title: Compress this diligence memo to its decision-relevant core
guidance: Reward the version that helps a partner reach a call, not the one that recaps the most.

runner_input.instruction: Compress the diligence memo below to its decision-relevant core for an IC one-pager.
runner_input.constraints: Max 250 words. Lead with the investment thesis or the primary red flag. Surface only what changes the decision.

source_blocks.text: UK facilities-management vertical SaaS. Priced at 8.5x ARR; CFO seat vacant.

items: Retention: 91% gross, 108% net — sticky via SFG20 compliance workflow
Dated codebase; founder-CTO is a single point of failure
Mgmt projects 40% growth; pipeline only supports ~28%
Analytics module cross-sell upside (4% of revenue today)

rubric_notes: Should foreground key-person risk and the growth-bridge gap (28% vs 40%).
Must not bury the CFO vacancy — it amplifies the key-person risk.
Good compressions surface the retention moat without merely restating the numbers.
